subcodes.first_line: O Sadiq! God willing, mayest thou attain unto the Dawning-place of truthfulness and be enabled to speak His praise. The acceptance and rejection of all things lie within His grasp [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای صادق انشاء الله بمطلع صدق فائز باشی و بذکرش ناطق رد و قبول کل شیء در قبضه
subcodes.subjects: @the state of enkindlement in teaching, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
